title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños to Accept the Deed of Donation Being Made by the Apex Club of Los Baños for the Kinsmen - Apex Clubs Nutrition Center of Laguna Building Located at the National Highway, Brgy. Malinta, Los Baños, Laguna and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (AUTHOR: HON. GERONIMO A. CICERON, 02/22/2021)
